description: Input schema for NextDecade Guidance documents. Guidance is advisory (best-practice recommendations). Shorter than Standards or Procedures — no Definitions, References, Exception Request, or Continuous Improvement sections. Section order: PURPOSE, INTEGRATED GOVERNANCE FRAMEWORK, GUIDELINE (intro + bullets), OWNERSHIP, APPROVAL, REVISION HISTORY. Pass a dict matching this shape to render_docx.render('guidance', data, output).
_post_render_markers_note: document_name and doc_number are required input fields but are NOT Jinja markers in the template. They are applied after render via _post_render_cover_fixup which patches plain-text placeholders (NAME, xxx-xxx-xxx-xxx-xxx-#####) in the cover-page text boxes and headers.

document_name.description: Document title shown on the cover page and in the running header. e.g., 'Remote Work Guidance', 'Hot Work Safety Guidance'.

doc_number.description: NextDecade document number in the format ORG-NTD-000010-XXX-GDN-#####. XXX = functional area (HSE, SAF, SEC, OPS, etc.). Shown on cover and in header.

purpose_text.description: PURPOSE section body. Single paragraph. Guidance documents combine Purpose and Scope into one section. State the advisory intent and who it applies to. e.g., 'This Guidance provides best-practice recommendations for remote work arrangements across NextDecade Corporation.'

governance_text.description: INTEGRATED GOVERNANCE FRAMEWORK section body. Single paragraph. Explain how this guidance fits into the broader NextDecade governance structure (Standards, Procedures, Guidance). Reference the parent Standard if applicable.

guideline_intro.description: Introductory paragraph of the GUIDELINE section, before the bulleted recommendations. Sets context for the best-practice list that follows.

guideline_bullets.description: Bulleted best-practice recommendations. Each string becomes a separate bullet paragraph in the GUIDELINE section. These are advisory, not mandatory.

raci.description: RACI matrix for the document. Single row with four responsibility assignments.

approval.description: Approval block at the end of the document.

shape.issuer: string — issuer name and title (e.g., 'VP of HSSE')

revision_history.description: Rows of the Revision History table (2 columns: Revision / Description of Changes and Notes). Uses the same `rev` key as the Procedure template's revision_history so schemas are consistent across doc types.

item_shape.description: string — what changed in this revision (e.g., 'Initial issue', 'Updated recommendations')
